_notes.spacing_pct: Grid level spacing as % of price. Must exceed 0.55% to beat fees.
_notes.range_pct: Half-width of the grid band around center price (e.g. 5.0 = ±5%).
_notes.levels: Total number of grid orders (split evenly buy/sell).
_notes.capital_pct: Fraction of total_capital to deploy (keep ≥20% as reserve).
_notes.total_capital: Your total GBP balance on crypto.com.
_notes.gbp_usd_rate: Approximate GBP/USD rate — update weekly or load from env.
_notes.kill_pct: Weekly loss limit as fraction of total_capital (0.10 = 10%).
